raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Approximately 270,000 students within California's K-12 school system are experiencing homelessness.",
    "The number of homeless students in California has grown by half over the past decade.",
    "In Santa Clara County alone, approximately 2,500 students are experiencing homelessness.",
    "The Guaranteed Income Pilot Program aims to provide crucial support to students experiencing homelessness in Santa Clara County.",
    "The Guaranteed Income Pilot Program will support 50 homeless students with a monthly stipend of $1,200.",
    "Guaranteed income pilots around the country are presented as a solution that stabilizes communities and supports efforts out of poverty.",
    "Senator Cortese's Senate Bill 333 is known as the California Success, Opportunity, and Academic Resilience (CalSOAR) Guaranteed Income Program.",
    "In 2021, a guaranteed income program for foster children was scaled statewide under Senator Cortese’s SB 739, leading to a historic $35 million investment."
  ]
}
```
